body: import org.junit.Test;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;

import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunner;
import org.apache.commons.codec.language.Soundex;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;
import static org.junit.Assert.*;

translation: assert "The character is not mapped: S (index=18)" in str(e.value)
# Parameter supplied to Soundex encode is not of type java.lang.String
assert str(e.value) == "Parameter supplied to Soundex encode is not of type java.lang.String"
soundex0 = Soundex(1, False, "Parameter supplied to Soundex encode is not of type java.lang.String", charArray0)
